top3.sql:
WITH state_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS avg_return
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            wr_returning_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
            ca_state,
            SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
        FROM web_returns
        JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2002
          AND ca_state = 'GA'
        GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ...

WITH state_avg AS (
    SELECT 
        ca_state,
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS avg_return
    FROM (
        SELECT 
            wr_returning_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
            ca_state,
            SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
        FROM web_returns
        JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
        JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
        WHERE d_year = 2002
          AND ca_state = 'GA'
        GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk, ...

WITH customer_returns_ga AS (
    SELECT 
        wr_returning_customer_sk AS customer_sk,
        SUM(wr_return_amt) AS ctr_total_return
    FROM web_returns
    JOIN date_dim ON wr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
    JOIN customer_address ON wr_returning_addr_sk = ca_address_sk
    WHERE d_year = 2002
      AND ca_state = 'GA'
    GROUP BY wr_returning_customer_sk
),
state_avg_ga AS (
    SELECT 
        AVG(ctr_total_return) AS avg_return
    FROM customer_returns_ga
),
